reviews.review_description: Flying as a bee feels unique, and the missions are great for short play sessions. I'd love to try it in co-op, it seems like it would be even more fun with friends.

reviews.review_title: Be a Bee, Show me Your Honey!
reviews.review_description: A bright, fun and engaging game with interesting mechanic and setting :) One has to action quickly to protect bees house and honey, I liked the game's pace and atmosohere. Also the hub has plenty of tiny fun things, and the idea of fanart inside is awesome!

developer_response.body:
Hey andrey! Love the energy of this, “show me your honey” haha 😄🐝

Really glad you enjoyed the pace and the atmosphere, that balance between action and strategy is something we care a lot about. Don’t forget to join our Discord and share your fan art too, we’d love to see it! 💛

reviews.review_description:
I had an awesome time playing this with my friends! The lobby is the best part in my opinion, because there is so much stuff to do lol

Also this game is quite a challange to be honest.  Love that there is some strategy involved, and each turret helps you in a different way (love the Chaos Storm btw).

Keep it up devs!! <3

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much, aegmor!! 😊

Really happy to hear you had a great time playing with friends! I love the lobby too, sometimes I end up spending more time there just chilling and having fun than actually playing a map😄

reviews.review_title: It's so much more than a tower defense
reviews.review_description: I've always loved more dynamic tower defense games, and Honey Pot brings that to life in an even better way. I don't even have to talk about how the multiplayer mode makes it even better. I absolutely loved the cartoony design and style of play. I haven't had a chance to try out the minigames yet, but I'm already loving the campaign! If you're a fan of tower defense games, I can't recommend it enough

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much, Luis! This means a lot, especially coming from someone who’s also a fan of tower defense games! 😊

Really happy to hear the multiplayer and overall pacing clicked for you, that mix is exactly what we’re aiming for.

Hope you get a chance to try the minigames soon too, they bring a whole different kind of fun and chaos!

reviews.review_description: I am a simple person. I see a bee game on vr that is 5 star reviewed, i check it out, i immediately like it beecause I love bees. I play several bee games, and this is now another one added to the list.

developer_response.body:
A true bee enthusiast, you’re definitely one of us! 🐝

Really happy to know Honey Pot made it into your bee game list. Thanks for giving it a shot and for the review!

reviews.review_description: Honey Pot is fun, colorful and the best part for me of it is flying. I aways dream that i am flying lol here i can feel a little what it feels like. Anyways, i have a great laugh with all little bears running and ruining my game. I like using the bow a lot, and i feel it is really accurate. Also love the OST.

developer_response.body:
Flying really is something special, right?

So glad you could actually experience and enjoy that feeling in the game! And thanks a lot for mentioning the OST, we put a lot of love and care into it, so it really means a lot to us to know you enjoyed the vibe 💛

reviews.review_title: This game is seriously worth a try!
reviews.review_description: I hopped into the game having low expectations and not knowing much about the game. But after playing this, wow. This game is 100% worth a try if you bored of playing those same old gorilla tag fan games. Cool mechanics, great design, strategy needed, and fun side quests. Not to mention the great tut. If you have some extra cash laying around or thinking about playing this game, make sure to check it out. Much love to the VRMonke team ❤️🔥🔥

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks for the feedback! 😊

Really glad the mechanics, strategy and side content stood out, and it’s awesome to know the tutorial helped as well!

Appreciate the support and the kind words, much love back to you 💛

reviews.review_description: I initially gave a 4 Star review due to a problem I had starting matches. Just played again and the devs fixed it! I love it when devs actually read reviews. Everyone check this game out! The flight and archery mechanics are pretty cool, especially in VR

developer_response.body:
Really appreciate you coming back and updating the review, that means a lot to us!

Glad to hear things are running better now and that you’re enjoying the flight and the bow mechanics!

The full release is coming soon, and we’re working to keep improving the overall experience and gameplay even further. Thanks again for the support! 💛

reviews.review_description: The genre of Honey Pot is 'cuteness'. The characters are so incredibly cute that I automatically smile as soon as I start playing. Before I know it, I'm not even playing the main game; I'm just dancing in front of the waiting room mirror. It's so much fun just playing the mini-games in the waiting room, even without fighting bears. And it seems they've added an update that supports various languages! I'm really pleased with that.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the great review and the kind words!💛

I’m the same haha, sometimes I just hang out in the lobby, chilling, exploring and having fun instead of jumping into matches.😅

The game will be leaving early access soon, so there’s even more content on the way. Hope you enjoy what’s coming next!

reviews.review_description:
incredible bee game! it has tower defense and social plays, i even made a friend in the lobby, before the game started! Then in the game, it has beautiful arts and outfits for customize my bee, and wow the art style is soo cute! 
for real i had an amazing time playing and flying with new friends in this game, cant wait for the new maps!

developer_response.body:
Love hearing that people are making friends in the lobby, it’s something we really hoped would happen as you play! Flying around with new friends must be such a fun experience 😄

The game will be leaving early access soon, so new content is on the way! Can’t wait for everyone to jump in and explore it!

reviews.review_description: Love

developer_response.body:
Love right back at you! 💛

Thanks a lot for the support!

reviews.review_description: This game is a charming VR tower defense with satisfying bow combat and smart tower-building. The minigames are super fun, too. Time well spent!

developer_response.body: Hey Julia! Thanks for spending some time in our little hive! 💛

reviews.review_description: Bee-tastic, I've always been fond of tower defense games, and this one is so immerse.... because it's vr so of course it is, bugs sometimes but vr does that a lot, so 5 stars and you should buy this game

developer_response.body:
Bee-tastic indeed!🐝

Thanks a lot for the support! The game will be leaving early access soon, so the overall experience should keep getting better and smoother.

Hope to see you around the hive!

reviews.review_description: I adore this game because of it being a crazy fun tower defense vr game. All the models and the whole game looks awesome and this game is very fun! 🐝

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and for the kind words!💛

reviews.review_description: What a beeautifull game! This is the type of game that you can notice the devs put their heart on to it, the details in each part. Recomend to play with your friends or make new ones on multiplayer, its a really fun wat to enjoy it. I hope the next worlds and minigames bee as fun as the ones that are playable at the moment. Goooooo beeees!

developer_response.body:
Beeeeautiful review!! 🐝

Beeelieve me, we’re really happy you noticed the little details, that’s where we put a lot of time and care. And yeah, playing with friends (or making new ones) is such a big part of the fun! See you in the hive!

reviews.review_title: Love the bees, it’s a memory-maker!
reviews.review_description:
I play Honey Pot with my daughter, and it’s been such a sweet experience!  We spend time together in the lobby trying on different skins, laughing, and then teaming up to defend the hive from those bears! 
It’s not just fun, it’s a memory-maker. We can really feel the love and care the team put into every part of the game. Super recommended!

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the thoughtful words and the recommendation!
That’s really special to hear, playing together and creating those moments is exactly what we hope for with the game. The idea of you both hanging out in the lobby and then teaming up to defend the hive is just awesome!
Means a lot to the whole team, thanks for sharing this 💛

reviews.review_description:
Great game and concept, it's a perfect game for VR with awesome flying mechanics, tower defense strategy, skins, mini games and your own bedroom in the hive. The value for money here is incredible. My 10yo daughter loves playing with me and my wife. This game deserves to bee a big hit. Grab it while it's at early access price! 

There seems to be a minor bug atm where even if you uncheck public session other people can join,you can mute voice chat so no big deal and the other players seem very friendly kids, keen on helping you win.

developer_response.body:
Hi Basilisk! Thank you so much for the kind words and for the lovely review! 🐝💛
.
We're so happy to hear you're playing Honey Pot as a family! Some of us on the team play with our kids and little bee relatives too, and it's been a special bonding experience for us! 
.
That bug you mentioned with private matches has been fixed in the new version 1.1.6! 
To play privately, just go to Custom Match → Host a Game, then share the code with your daughter. That should keep it just the two (or three!) of you in your own cozy hive. 
.
Thanks again for your support, your patience, and for spreading the buzz. It means the world to our small team!

reviews.review_description:
“Don’t make a plan of fighting.That is a very good way to lose your honey.
[…]
Empty your mind. Bee formless, shapeless, like honey. Put honey into a pot, it becomes the honeypot. Honey can flow or creep or drip or crash. 

Bee honey, my sweet friend.”

developer_response.body:
Beeeautiful wisdom right there! 🐝
Bee like honey… we might have to frame that in the hive!

Thanks a lot for playing and for the creative review, that was a fun one!

reviews.review_description: This game is about a story where you are a bee. A bunch of bears are trying to attack and you are the only one to stop them. You try to get honey to get weapons. It’s almost like a tower defense game! There are flowers aswell that can help you get more honey. I see great potential In this game! (I spent 15 minutes playing with toys in the lobby 😭)

developer_response.body:
15 minutes in the lobby? Totally valid 😄

Love how you described the whole experience, and really appreciate you seeing the potential in it! Thanks a lot for the support!

reviews.review_description: Even though the game came out today the games first and second season are visually and physically stunning. This game has fun strategic gameplay with an amazing OST to listen to while playing, this is a must buy game for strategy game players and even FPS players!

developer_response.body:
Hello Smaze! Loved reading your review!
Great to hear the mix of strategy and action worked for you, and that the OST stood out too, the team put a lot of love into it.
Thanks a lot for the support, it really means a lot to us!

reviews.review_description:
An amazing tower defense game that adds cuteness and player movement to the mix.
This game has it all! From fun game modes to tons of beeutiful skins.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the support and review!

Hope you had a chance to check out the Easter skins we added recently too!

reviews.review_description: Nice game very cute idea however it is hard to find a lobby with people

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback, Dansan!

The game will be leaving early access soon, so there should be more and more players jumping in!

Also feel free to join our Discord, it’s a great place to meet other players and set up some matches! 🐝

reviews.review_description: I've always loved tower defense games but this is another level. You can truly see this is a labor of love. The main game, the minigames, the skins, the experiences you have with your friends in this, the team really went the extra mile to make sure you have the (bee)st time ever. It's so much fun, perfect for people that like challenges, multiplayers, bees and honey 🍯 savethebees!!! Highly recommend.

developer_response.body:
Amazing “beexperience” haha we love that 😄

Thanks a lot for the recommendation and for the kind words, it really means a lot to the team. Hearing that all those pieces came together for you is super rewarding 💛

#Savethebees always!

reviews.review_description: There is nothing bad about this game and I love on how it’s a tower defence game

developer_response.body:
BEEEEUTIFUL review!!

Thank you so much, really glad you’re enjoying the game! 😄

reviews.review_description: If you like tower defense games, this is the game for you

developer_response.body: Happy to have you in the hive! Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Absolutely Beeutiful

developer_response.body:
Hey MH20! Bezzzt review!!

Thanks so much for being part of our hive! 💛

reviews.review_description: I’m a huge fan of tower defense games, and I’m so hyped I can finally play one in VR! This game mixes strategy with super cute vibes. Honestly, it’s the perfect combo. Totally hooked!

developer_response.body:
Hey Isa! Thanks for playing! 
So happy to hear you’re enjoying the mix of strategy and cute vibes!🐝💛

reviews.review_title: TD in VR!? I thought it was impossible..
reviews.review_description:
BUT THEY DID IT!

It is kind of crazy, but the VRMonkey team pulled it off! Playing the game in multiplayer was awesome, little like the feeling of playing overcooked.
You must communicate and have some strategy, which combines perfect with a TD game!
Also, Bees are soooo cute!

10/10

developer_response.body:
Pulling off tower defense in VR was definitely a challenge, so it’s awesome to hear it worked for you! And yeah, things can get pretty chaotic fun in multiplayer, communication really is key! 
Thanks foe the review!💛

reviews.review_description: Bzzz bzz bzzz-BZZ, bzzz bzzz BZZZZ bzz-bzzt bzzzzzz! Bzz-bzzt BZZZ bzz bzzz bzzzzz-BZZ! Bzzz bzz bzzzzzt, bzzz-BZZ bzz BZZZZZ bzzzt bzz bzz-bzzt bzzzzz 🍯

developer_response.body:
Bzzz bzz! 🐝

Bzzt bzzz bzz-bzz, BZZZ bzzz bzzt!💛

reviews.review_title: Honey Pot - EPIC TOWER DEFENSE IN VR
reviews.review_description: I never thought that this style of game could work so well in VR. I’ve played about 15 matches now and each one has led me through a unique experience whether it is setting up honey collectors, defending the towers and shooting enemies while gliding! My favorite thing to do is shoot enemies with my stinger for the big explosion, afterwards you die… and become a really cool ghost bee. But don’t worry! You respawn as a normal bee very quickly. This is a great game to play with your friends especially if you like tower defense games.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the detailed review!

I’m also a big fan of the stinger kaboom hehe, but remember to use it wisely, it can make all the difference between a great play or a big L!

See you in the hive!

reviews.review_description: I wanted so much this game, I love doing strategies to protect the Hive, BEST VR GAME!!!!

developer_response.body: Happy to have you in the hive, thanks a lot for the support!

reviews.review_description: Fun movement, fun level, fun costumes, fun playing with friends!!

developer_response.body: Really appreciate it! Glad you had fun in the hive 😄

reviews.review_description: Great to be a bee and defend the hive

developer_response.body: Hey rafael! Thanks for playing and for the kind words!

reviews.review_description:
If you're a fan of Tower Defense games, Honeypot is a must-buy, you won’t regret it! 

The game is super cute, vibrant, and a blast to play. Best of all, if you enjoy multiplayer coop, you can team up with your friends and come up with the best strategies to take down the bears!

developer_response.body:
Adorable, colorful and fun, we love that! 

Really nice to hear you enjoyed the co-op and the strategy side of it, teaming up with friends and figuring things out together is such a big and fun part of the game experience.

Thanks a lot for the review and the recommendation, it means a lot to us!💛

reviews.review_description: Very cozy and engaging game. The art style is so charming and the gameplay feels great. These devs are cool 😎Recommended!

developer_response.body:
Hey Erick, you’re the cool one here!😎

Thanks a ton for the review! Awesome to know you enjoyed the art style, our art team is gonna love hearing that!💛

reviews.review_description: The movement is incredibly innovative. Flying feels natural and immersive like never before in VR.

developer_response.body:
It’s great to know you felt that natural feeling while flying and playing!

Thanks a lot for the review!

reviews.review_description: It has beeing a long time after I played a really fun tower defense that got me pumped. This one can definitely get your blood pumping, no matter how many friends are playing with you. I just hope your friend group are better at working together than mine lol

developer_response.body:
Really cool to hear Honey Pot brought that feeling back for you!
That’s how friends are haha, some are fully focused on saving the hive, others are just… observing the chaos and pretending to help 😅

Thanks a lot for the review!

reviews.review_description: I loved this game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the love! Hope you keep having fun with us!

reviews.review_description: What makes this game so fun is the physical side of it. You flap your arms to fly around and it's really satisfying- it feels very natural. We eally love the Bee-noculars! Wish that was in every game.   This game is cute, and has a lot of heart.

developer_response.body:
Flapping around never gets old right? 😄🐝
Really happy that part felt good to play! 
Thanks for the recommendation!

reviews.review_description: Fun and Cute!

developer_response.body: Hey Bruno! Thanks for playing and for the review!

reviews.review_title: Its a fun, witty, tower defense game!
reviews.review_description: One of the best games of the genre i've ever played! Its colorful, bee themed, and i can play it with my friends! Its so cool trying all the different turrets and trying to protect the hive from bears! ABSOLUTELY RECOMMENDED!

developer_response.body:
That’s awesome to read!
Really appreciate the recommendation!
